articles.title: Bridging Knowledge Graphs with Retrieval-Augmented Generation

experience.description: Modeled 8k+ healthcare entity relationships in Azure Cosmos DB and ran time-series analysis across 5k+ legal queries to detect emerging regulatory trends.
Automated fleet and delivery dashboards for real-time visibility, and forecasted shipment demand from 48+ months of historical data.
Built a computer vision model for cheque fraud detection, reaching 83% validation accuracy after expanding the training set from 4k to 14k images.

projects.name: Hospital Readmission Prediction
projects.description: Predicted 30-day readmission and length of stay across 100k+ inpatient encounters using the Diabetes 130-US Hospitals dataset (AUC = 0.649, RMSE = 2.17 days).

projects.name: CFPB Complaint Modeling & Classification
projects.description: Modeled socioeconomic disparities in consumer complaints by combining CFPB, ACS, and postal data, reaching 0.77 multiclass accuracy and 0.93 F1 for high-priority complaint triage.

projects.name: Insaf.AI - Legal NLP Data Extraction
projects.description: An NLP pipeline that extracts structured legal entities from free-text input to support automated First Information Report (FIR) drafting.

projects.name: Molecular Property Prediction
projects.techstack: Python, PyTorch, PyTorch Geometric, GNN, SchNet, RDKit
projects.description: Predicted quantum chemical properties on the QM9 dataset (134k molecules) across five models of increasing complexity, cutting MAE 55% over the fingerprint baseline by incorporating 3D atomic geometry.

projects.name: Where Have All the Bands Gone?
projects.techstack: Python, D3.js, Observable Plot, MusicBrainz API, Quarto
projects.description: A data journalism site tracing six decades of Billboard Hot 100 history across 340k+ chart entries and 11k+ artists, with 8 custom interactive visualizations built in D3.js and Observable Plot.
